name: Orb of Conflict
description: Notes An extremely rare and unique untiered orb. This orb gives both Speedy and Damaging, turning the Mystic into a highly mobile killing machine for a few seconds. It also gives +5 ATT and +5 DEX, giving some much needed firepower. On top of that, this orb has the highest stasis duration of all orbs. Watch out for Speedy - you should be careful not to run into anything dangerous.
effects: On enemies: Stasis Stasis Radius: 3 tiles Stasis Duration: 7 seconds On self: Speedy and Damaging Speedy & Damaging Duration: 2 (+0.1 per WIS over 50) seconds
